tasks.title: Add URL decoding to path validation to prevent bypass

files_to_create.description: Tests for URL-encoded path traversal detection

files_to_modify.description: Add URL decoding before forbidden path checks

core_functionality: URL-encoded dots (%2e%2e) are decoded and detected as path traversal
URL-encoded slashes (%2f) are decoded and validated
Double-encoded paths are properly decoded
Valid paths with URL encoding are allowed
testing: All URL encoding bypass tests pass
Add regression test for production URL formats

tasks.implementation_guidance: import urllib.parse; decoded_path = urllib.parse.unquote(path); # Then validate decoded_path
tasks.test_strategy: Test all URL encoding schemes: single-encoded, double-encoded, mixed encoding
tasks.notes: SECURITY CRITICAL - known vulnerability documented in skipped tests

tasks.title: Add Unicode normalization to prevent path traversal bypass

files_to_modify.description: Apply NFKC normalization before path validation
Unskip 5 Unicode bypass tests at line 161

core_functionality: Unicode slash (\u2215) normalized to ASCII slash
Fullwidth characters normalized to ASCII equivalents
Overlong UTF-8 sequences normalized
All Unicode forms (NFC, NFD, NFKC, NFKD) handled correctly
testing: Test with actual Unicode attack payloads

tasks.test_strategy: Test Unicode equivalents of dangerous characters, test all normalization forms
tasks.notes: SECURITY CRITICAL - Unicode bypass attacks well-documented

tasks.title: Enable SQLite foreign key constraints to prevent orphaned records

files_to_modify.description: Enable PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON for all connections

core_functionality: Foreign keys enforced in all database connections
Cannot create child record with non-existent parent
Deleting parent with children raises constraint error
Connection pooling preserves foreign key setting
testing: Test passes with real foreign key enforcement
Add tests for cascade delete behavior

tasks.implementation_guidance: conn.execute('PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON') immediately after connection creation
tasks.test_strategy: Test with multi-process scenarios, verify enforcement across connection pool
success_metrics: Foreign key test unskipped and passing
Zero orphaned records in integration tests
All database operations respect referential integrity
tasks.notes: Critical data integrity issue - currently allows orphaned records
